name: Toffee Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle enough chopped pecans on bottom of a greased 9 inch square pan to cover it; about 1 cup.
2. Combine the brown sugar and butter in a saucepan (an iron skillet is best). Using low heat, bring to a boil, stirring constantly for 7 minutes only. Be careful not to scorch. Remove from heat and spread over nuts.
3. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top. Cover pan with a skillet or lid so heat will melt the chocolate. Spread evenly over top.
4. Refrigerate until set. Break into pieces.
